programme.title: Biz Talk
programme.desc: A groundbreaking 30-minute interview show, giving an in-depth look into how top companies around the world conduct business and how policymakers view the fast-changing world economy. It presents 360 degree profiles of industry movers and shakers, tech mavericks and policymakers, and drills down on the stories behind their success, to give you clarity on what’s happening in every facet of business.

programme.title: The World Today
programme.desc: The World Today is the core rolling service of CGTN. keep viewers up-to-date with all the world's top stories as they happen.

programme.title: Inheritors
programme.desc: Inheritors is a multi-media product from CGTN that shines a light on China’s rich Intangible Cultural Heritage. Each 30-minute TV edition is hosted by a long-term expatriate in China who has a unique understanding of the country’s culture. He or she will introduce viewers to people who are dedicating their lives to its protection, inheritance, innovation, development and promotion.

programme.title: The Agenda
programme.desc: A weekly talk-show looking beyond the headlines and “accepted wisdom” to find the real story. Hosted by award-winning journalist and presenter Stephen Cole, The Agenda quite simply sets The Agenda . You won’t find the same-old talking heads recycling platitudes; instead thought-provoking guests to debate and explore key issues of today’s world. Using virtual reality graphics to bring subjects to life, Stephen will navigate through subjects ranging from “Prove That Climate Change Exists” to “Who Will Win the Race to Space”. Opposing views will be given opportunity to flourish and develop into a meaningful conversation.

programme.title: Razor
programme.desc: CGTN's brand new science and technology show, covering cutting edge developments from all over the world. RAZOR will show you the world's most powerful laser and the world's smallest anti-cancer treatment. It will take you from the weird world of quantum computing to the boundaries of the cosmos. An international team of reporters will follow the guidance of Occam's Razor - the principle that the simplest explanation is the best one. RAZOR will show that we are already "living in the future"!

programme.desc: La lettura critica dei giornali, con le aperture, le analisi, i commenti e le idee. L'obiettivo è connettere i punti, cercare di dare un filo conduttore alle notizie internazionali, di politica italiana, di economia, di cronaca.

programme.title: Living China
programme.desc: Real life stories told from the personal perspective. Moving, dramatic, sorrows and joys, expressed emphatically and expressed quietly. Watch closely to see and understand the real China as it is lived.

programme.title: Special Edition
programme.desc: Prestige Chinese documentary production, tackling serious subjects with the best cinematography, editing, and all round production values with a unique Chinese perspective.

programme.title: Journeys and Discoveries
programme.desc: A documentary series showcasing the history of China and its people.

programme.title: History in the Frame
programme.desc: A documentary series featuring historical and archaeological exploration.

programme.title: Best Eats
programme.desc: Food connects people! A feast for the eyes that spotlights the cuisines of China in a way that’s bound to set the mouths of the whole globe watering!

programme.title: Youthful China
programme.desc: The youth of a country is the future of that country. A series of documentaries focusing on the younger generation of China in which you get to see what they are achieving and what makes them tick!

programme.title: Pixel Collage
programme.desc: A well-crafted collage of selected short documentaries telling stories about all aspects of China! People, technology, culture, and wildlife, all are showcased in Internet-friendly form.

programme.title: Today’s Top Pick
programme.desc: Documentaries in this slot are rebroadcasts of our most-viewed and most popular stories of the season. They feature important social, economic, environmental or other policy-driven issues, affecting lives nationwide or simply in one small village. A broad selection of top productions by Chinese top documentary producers.

programme.title: Humanities and Geography
programme.desc: A strand devoted to the nature and wildlife of China, the people who lived alongside them, and the great and diverse landscapes with which they all contend.

programme.title: Life on the Edge - S01:E04 - Building a Wilderness Cabin
programme.desc: At Volcano Bay, nerves begin to fray for Charlie Summerville and his team as they embark on constructing the wilderness cabin.

programme.title: Royal Documentaries - S01:E27 - Diana And Sarah The Royal Wives Of Windsor Part 1
programme.desc: As royal wives, both Diana and Fergie experienced a life filled with loneliness and sadness, despite their high hopes of bringing change to the House of Windsor. What was supposed to be their 'fairy-tale' lives ended up being far from that reality.

programme.title: Royal Documentaries - S01:E28 - Diana And Sarah The Royal Wives Of Windsor Part 2
programme.desc: Diana, Princess of Wales, and Sarah, Duchess of York both married into the Queen's family, leaving in the midst of scandals, though their exits were quite different. Sadly, Diana passed away, while Sarah survived to start anew. Over time, their struggles can be better understood, and this documentary explores those challenges...

programme.title: Jim Shockey's Uncharted - S01:E12 - The Last Hunters
programme.desc: Arctic Pt3. The Inuit take Jim and Corey on their last adventure together. Jim finds inspiration from empty stretches of broken ice and the people who live off it.

programme.title: Wardens - S06:E05 - False Witness
programme.desc: Block Management is one of the keys to great hunting in Montana U.S.A. but the rules are set. If you are going to break them, the Wardens will be there to hold you accountable.

programme.title: Wardens - S06:E06 - Frozen Fire
programme.desc: When a report of an illegal buck surfaces, Warden Joe Kambic goes to work to find the shooters. Things heat up for Warden Rick Smauch when he responds to a fire; and Bryan Golie fights the winter weather just to patrol his area.

programme.title: The New Frontier - S04:E07 - Martian Attractions
programme.desc: This is the latest in Martian exploration, not just from orbit but also from rovers on the ground. New sources of water and planetary dust storms are a few of the stories unfolding on the Red Planet.

programme.title: The New Frontier - S04:E08 - Cubes
programme.desc: Cubesats are miniature satellites that have been used exclusively in low Earth orbit for 15 years. Now, these tiny satellites are growing in mainstream popularity and are being used for interplanetary missions as well. They have even been sent to Mars with the Insight Mission, in hopes of better understanding the red planet, our solar system, and beyond.

programme.title: S05:E01 - Terry's Lethal Weapon
programme.desc: Terry and Larry tackle the epic Lethal Weapon series testing 4 different scenes.

programme.title: Hollywood Weapons - S05:E02 - Jean Claude Van Schappert
programme.desc: Terry enters the world of Slow-Mo and explosions trying to imitate Jean Claude in Hart Target. Terry and Larry will be testing 5 scenes from the Hard Target films. One of which will make you never look through a peephole again.

programme.title: Royal Documentaries - S01:E34 - Prince William And Prince Harry The Next Royal Generation
programme.desc: Prince William and Prince Harry, along with their friends, got as much media attention as today’s pop stars, fashion icons, and movie celebs. This documentary explores how this affected their personal lives and friendships, showcasing how they managed their fame alongside their royal responsibilities.

programme.title: Royal Documentaries - S01:E27 - Diana And Sarah The Royal Wives Of Windsor Part 1
programme.desc: As royal wives, both Diana and Fergie experienced a life filled with loneliness and sadness, despite their high hopes of bringing change to the House of Windsor. What was supposed to be their 'fairy-tale' lives ended up being far from that reality.

programme.title: S05:E01 - Terry's Lethal Weapon
programme.desc: Terry and Larry tackle the epic Lethal Weapon series testing 4 different scenes.

programme.title: Hollywood Weapons - S05:E02 - Jean Claude Van Schappert
programme.desc: Terry enters the world of Slow-Mo and explosions trying to imitate Jean Claude in Hart Target. Terry and Larry will be testing 5 scenes from the Hard Target films. One of which will make you never look through a peephole again.

programme.title: Royal Documentaries - S01:E34 - Prince William And Prince Harry The Next Royal Generation
programme.desc: Prince William and Prince Harry, along with their friends, got as much media attention as today’s pop stars, fashion icons, and movie celebs. This documentary explores how this affected their personal lives and friendships, showcasing how they managed their fame alongside their royal responsibilities.

programme.title: Royal Documentaries - S01:E27 - Diana And Sarah The Royal Wives Of Windsor Part 1
programme.desc: As royal wives, both Diana and Fergie experienced a life filled with loneliness and sadness, despite their high hopes of bringing change to the House of Windsor. What was supposed to be their 'fairy-tale' lives ended up being far from that reality.

programme.title: Royal Documentaries - S01:E28 - Diana And Sarah The Royal Wives Of Windsor Part 2
programme.desc: Diana, Princess of Wales, and Sarah, Duchess of York both married into the Queen's family, leaving in the midst of scandals, though their exits were quite different. Sadly, Diana passed away, while Sarah survived to start anew. Over time, their struggles can be better understood, and this documentary explores those challenges...

programme.title: Jim Shockey's Uncharted - S01:E12 - The Last Hunters
programme.desc: Arctic Pt3. The Inuit take Jim and Corey on their last adventure together. Jim finds inspiration from empty stretches of broken ice and the people who live off it.

programme.title: Wardens - S06:E05 - False Witness
programme.desc: Block Management is one of the keys to great hunting in Montana U.S.A. but the rules are set. If you are going to break them, the Wardens will be there to hold you accountable.

programme.title: Wardens - S06:E06 - Frozen Fire
programme.desc: When a report of an illegal buck surfaces, Warden Joe Kambic goes to work to find the shooters. Things heat up for Warden Rick Smauch when he responds to a fire; and Bryan Golie fights the winter weather just to patrol his area.

programme.title: The New Frontier - S04:E07 - Martian Attractions
programme.desc: This is the latest in Martian exploration, not just from orbit but also from rovers on the ground. New sources of water and planetary dust storms are a few of the stories unfolding on the Red Planet.

programme.title: The New Frontier - S04:E08 - Cubes
programme.desc: Cubesats are miniature satellites that have been used exclusively in low Earth orbit for 15 years. Now, these tiny satellites are growing in mainstream popularity and are being used for interplanetary missions as well. They have even been sent to Mars with the Insight Mission, in hopes of better understanding the red planet, our solar system, and beyond.

programme.title: S05:E01 - Terry's Lethal Weapon
programme.desc: Terry and Larry tackle the epic Lethal Weapon series testing 4 different scenes.

programme.title: Hollywood Weapons - S05:E02 - Jean Claude Van Schappert

programme.title: Royal Documentaries - S01:E45 - Charles A Portrait A Man Alone
programme.desc: This tells the tale of a man juggling the stress of his public obligations with the challenges of a failing marriage that's playing out in front of the world. It's a special look at the man fated to become King.

programme.title: Royal Documentaries - S01:E44 - 50 Glorious Years A Royal Celebration
programme.desc: Honoring 50 years of marriage between Her Majesty the Queen and her husband, Prince Philip of Greece and Denmark, the Duke of Edinburgh.

programme.title: Jim Shockey's Uncharted - S01:E13 - The Best of Season 1
programme.desc: The best adventures and highlights from Uncharted so far.

programme.title: Wardens - S06:E07 - River Rescue
programme.desc: Drownings happen every Summer on the lakes and rivers of Montana U.S.A. Region 1 Warden Chris Crane steps in to save a person in a kayak, while Region 2 Wardens catch friends fishing in the wrong spot.

programme.title: Wardens - S06:E08 - Death Valley
programme.desc: Something is killing deer in the Missoula Valley of Montana U.S.A. and it has Fish, Wildlife and Parks working overtime to find the culprit.

programme.title: The New Frontier - S04:E09 - Proving Einstein
programme.desc: The evidence to prove some of Einstein's theories had long been elusive, beyond the capabilities of technology, until now. It appears that Einstein is once again triumphant as we discover the latest in deep space observations.

programme.title: The New Frontier - S04:E10 - Where are all the Aliens?
programme.desc: We're looking hard, but the numbers aren't stacking up. Is life on other planets really that hard to find? Does it even exist? We have not discovered so much as a signal, so maybe we really are alone in our neck of the galaxy.

programme.title: Hollywood Weapons - S05:E03 - S-Smart Terry
programme.desc: Give me some sugar baby. Terry travels through time where he will test the cult favourite, Army of Darkness. Terry not only gets to test several scenes, but also gets a sit down with the legendary Bruce Campbell.

programme.title: Hollywood Weapons - S05:E04 - Terry's Brave Heart
programme.desc: Terry gets to annoy Larry with his impersonation of William Wallace from Braveheart. He not only gets to wield Sir William's sword, but also convinces Larry to build him a trebuchet.

programme.title: Royal Documentaries - S01:E01 - Diana A Portrait
programme.desc: Diana, Princess of Wales, was incredibly enchanting and unforgettable, leaving a lasting impact like no other woman of her era. Known as a fairy-tale princess, a loving wife, a dedicated mother, and a style icon, this documentary digs deeper to uncover the true person behind the endless spotlight.

programme.title: Extreme Weather Countdown

programme.title: Extreme Weather Countdown
programme.desc: Weather is an unrelenting force, tearing through our lives and homes, with no regard for the human condition. But lucky for us, these humans have been conditioned to take out their phones and record whatever is happening, letting us relive the experiences again and again. And when it comes to weather that is out of the ordinary, that's truly where we come alive. Strap in, because you're about to get hit by an Extreme Weather Countdown.

programme.title: Extreme Weather Countdown
programme.desc: When the weather gets rough, the brave start recording. From raging hurricanes to devastating dust storms, it's time to watch as we showcase some of the wildest weather ever caught on film. It's time for Extreme Weather Countdown!

programme.title: Forensic Files

programme.title: Forensic Files

programme.title: Forensic Files

programme.title: Forensic Files

programme.desc: Due rapper danno istruzioni alle squadre per creare i propri menu.

programme.title: Hell's Kitchen
programme.desc: Gli altri otto chef partecipano all'annuale prova di degustazione alla cieca.

programme.title: Hell's Kitchen
programme.desc: Un concorrente ha la possibilità di presentare un piatto per il calendario di Hell’s Kitchen.

programme.title: Hell's Kitchen
programme.desc: Tra gli ospiti a cena c’è l'attrice e l'ambasciatore della celebrità di Oxfam, Minnie Driver.

programme.title: Hell's Kitchen Italy
programme.desc: La prima prova di questa puntata vede protagonisti la Pina e il marito Emiliano Pepe. Dovranno cucinare un piatto famoso guidati dai cuochi delle due squadre.

programme.title: Hell's Kitchen Italy
programme.desc: I cuochi di Hell’s Kitchen dovranno affrontarsi in una prova particolare: non potranno usare acqua nella creazione di tre piatti, ma solo liquidi alternativi.

programme.title: Hell's Kitchen Italy
programme.desc: Le due brigate di Hell’s Kitchen si trovano ad affrontare come prova la simulazione di un servizio in camera presso l’Excelsior Hotel Gallia.

programme.title: Hell's Kitchen Italy
programme.desc: Per la prova a squadre di questa puntata l’ospite speciale sarà Fredrik Berselius, Chef svedese che si è guadagnato una stella Michelin con il suo ristorante a Brooklyn.

programme.title: Hell's Kitchen Italy
programme.desc: Al centro della prima prova di questa puntata troviamo le passioni di Costantino della Gherardesca, ogni piatto dovrà rappresentarle.

programme.title: Hell's Kitchen
programme.desc: I restanti concorrenti cucinano versioni gourmet di street food.

programme.title: Hell's Kitchen
programme.desc: La leggenda dei fumetti Stan Lee si siede al tavolo dello chef.

programme.title: Hell's Kitchen
programme.desc: Termina un servizio a cena impegnativo con solo due chef rimasti a contendersi il premio finale.

programme.title: Hell's Kitchen
programme.desc: La gara di cucina raggiunge il suo culmine.

programme.title: Hell's Kitchen
programme.desc: Gordon Ramsay divide gli chef in due squadre di uomini e donne per la loro prima sfida.

programme.title: Hell's Kitchen
programme.desc: Un risotto mal riuscito potrebbe segnare la fine per uno sfortunato concorrente.

programme.title: Hell's Kitchen
programme.desc: Gli chef realizzano le ricette stampate sul retro delle loro giacche da servire a ospiti VIP.

programme.title: Hell's Kitchen
programme.desc: Gordon sfida il team a fare catering ad una cerimonia di laurea.

programme.title: Hell's Kitchen
programme.desc: Le squadre cucinano per la madre di Gordon, Helen.

programme.title: Hell's Kitchen
programme.desc: Gli animi si infiammano quando Gordon rimprovera le squadre di regredire piuttosto che progredire.

programme.title: Hell's Kitchen
programme.desc: Questa sfida è ispirata all’opera italiana, e le squadre preparano pietanze italiane.

programme.title: Hell's Kitchen
programme.desc: I team preparano una degustazione per una mostra canina.

programme.title: Hell's Kitchen
programme.desc: Al servizio serale, i cuochi preparano pietanze per leggende della musica, tra cui Steven Tyler degli Aerosmith.

programme.title: Hell's Kitchen
programme.desc: Gli chef in gara sono sfidati a creare piatti ispirati alla cucina indiana.

programme.title: Hell's Kitchen
programme.desc: Il servizio serale è tenuto in onore di un gruppo di vigili del fuoco decorati.

programme.title: Hell's Kitchen
programme.desc: Le squadre sono sfidate a creare i propri stuzzichini da aperitivo.

programme.title: Hell's Kitchen
programme.desc: La sfida degli ultimi sei concorrenti è quello di creare un piatto con bistecche Omaha.

programme.title: Hell's Kitchen
programme.desc: I concorrenti in gara preparano piatti gourmet per amanti del glamping.

programme.title: Hell's Kitchen
programme.desc: Quali saranno i due chef in finale?

programme.title: Hell's Kitchen
programme.desc: Gordon Ramsay sceglie il vincitore della gara di quest'anno.

programme.title: Hell's Kitchen Italy
programme.desc: E’ il giorno della finale a Hell’s Kitchen. I cuochi si svegliano e trovano sul tavolo una sorpresa: ci sono 4 buste per loro.

programme.title: Hell's Kitchen Italy
programme.desc: I concorrenti alloggiano nel loft di Hell's Kitchen e hanno una notte intera per studiare il menu che serviranno la sera successiva. Durante la notte i concorrenti vengono svegliati continuamente da una sirena e su un televisore assistono alle lezioni di cucina dello Chef Cracco. Alle 8:00 i concorrenti scendono nelle cucine e Cracco mostra loro come tagliare la carne per fare il filetto alla Rossini.

programme.title: Hell's Kitchen Italy
programme.desc: Il servizio non va bene e Cracco è costretto a chiudere anticipatamente prima la cucina blu e poi la cucina rossa. I concorrenti vengono mandati nel loft e hanno 30 minuti di tempo per decidere i loro nominati per l'eliminazione. La squadra rossa nomina Lorena e Amelia, la squadra blu Andrea e Gene.

programme.title: Hell's Kitchen Italy
programme.desc: Le due squadre si affrontano in una sfida diretta sull'assaggio: i due concorrenti, bendati e dotati di cuffie, devono individuare quattro diversi alimenti solo assaggiandoli; vince la squadra che indovina il maggior numero di alimenti. La prova termina in parità, quindi vi è uno spareggio fra i concorrenti più forti delle due squadre (Lorenza e Gianluca) che determina la vittoria dei rossi. Per punizione, la squadra blu deve pulire 90 kg di pesce per il servizio, mentre la squadra rossa si gode alcune ore in un centro benessere.

programme.title: Hell's Kitchen Italy
programme.desc: Le due squadre affrontano una prova in esterna che ha luogo in una fattoria: i concorrenti devono condurre nelle stalle alcuni animali, ad ognuno dei quali corrisponde un ingrediente; alla fine le due squadre devono preparare un piatto con gli ingredienti conquistati e Cracco determina la squadra vincitrice. I blu propongono dei ravioli di zucca con pancetta, i rossi propongono un filetto di cervo; la squadra rossa vince la sfida e come ricompensa ottiene una serata alla Terrazza Trussardi di Milano in compagnia dello chef Cracco.

programme.title: Hell's Kitchen
programme.desc: Il vincitore della prima sfida andrà a cena con William Shatner.

programme.title: Hell's Kitchen
programme.desc: Durante il servizio serale, un Gordon infuriato caccia un'intera squadra fuori dalla cucina.

programme.title: Hell's Kitchen
programme.desc: Gli chef hanno il compito di abbinare le teste di pesce al resto del corpo correttamente.

programme.title: Hell's Kitchen
programme.desc: Le squadre sono sfidate a creare portate con spaghetti, hamburger, pizza e maccheroni al formaggio.

programme.title: Hell's Kitchen
programme.desc: Le squadre devono creare i piatti più deliziosi a base di formaggio al fine di vincere un'avventura in oceano.

programme.title: Hell's Kitchen
programme.desc: Gli chef creano un servizio speciale a pranzo in onore di due enti di beneficenza gestiti dai vigili del fuoco di Los Angeles.

programme.title: Hell's Kitchen
programme.desc: Questa volta, gli chef devono preparare un pasto greco

programme.title: Pingu
programme.desc: Pingu is upset after he loses several games of hide and seek. | After being selfish, Pingu feels left out when his family is hanging the wash together. | Pingu convinces his father to go mountain climbing after finding an old photo.

programme.title: Pingu
programme.desc: Pingu goes fishing and promises to be back in time for dinner. | Pingu and Pinga are playing with their toys. But when Pingi comes along, Pingu decides he is too old for toys and thinks it's much cooler to show off for Pingi instead. | Pingu hatches a plan to keep snow off of his father’s car.

programme.title: Pingu
programme.desc: Pingu has the day off of school and wants to enjoy his freedom rather than help his Mother. | Pingu gets into a little mischief after he finds a bow and arrow. | Pingu ignores a warning about flying his kite near his irritable neighbour’s house and has to try and get it back.

programme.title: Pingu
programme.desc: Pingu discovers a magnet and decides to use it to trick his friend. | Pingu is playing with his boat on the water, but it keeps sinking because of a leaky hull. | After Pingu falls asleep while playing with his toys, he has a really sweet dream.

programme.title: Pingu
programme.desc: Thoughtless Pingu tries to play a trick on his Grandfather not realising how dangerous his trick is. | When Pingu and Pinga see a real plane fly over their igloo, they decide to build their own airplane. | Pingu is constantly annoying and playing tricks on Pinga until she almost starts to cry.

programme.title: Pingu
programme.desc: Pingu sees a magic kit in the shop and really wants it. | Pingu discovers a large present on his birthday. He wants to open it but is told he has to wait. | When Father insists that Pingu put everything in its right place, Pingu gets organized.

programme.title: Pingu
programme.desc: Pingu sees a picture in a book of a tower that goes to the sky and wants to build one just like it. | Pinga discovers a book about kingdoms and Pingu thinks that it would be great to be a king. | Pingu wants to bake his own cake.

programme.title: Pingu
programme.desc: The arm on Pinga’s teddy bear comes off while Pingu plays with it. | When there are endless delays setting off in the snowmobile, Pingu goes on foot to help Grandfather. | Pingu has a bad day. He stumbles over some of his toys, has a bad journey to school, and can't answer the teacher’s questions.

programme.title: Pingu
programme.desc: Showing off, Pingu bets Pinga that he can shoot balls at a can better than she can. | Pingu is doing very badly at his sports day. When he stops to help a friend on the last event, it’s Pingu that wins top prize. | Pingu is delighted when he receives a Valentine’s Day card from Pingi.

programme.title: Pingu
programme.desc: Pingu has to keep his sister, Pinga, out of trouble when she sleepwalks her way out of the igloo and through other penguin’s homes. | Pingu is bouncing on everything in the igloo, from his bed to the armchairs. | Pingu is teasing his sister and her favourite toy rabbit tumbles out of the window.

programme.title: Pingu
programme.desc: Pingu and Pinga are hanging up the washing. When a big gust of wind catches the towels, they give chase. | Watching a seagull in flight makes Pingu want to fly. | After Father shovels snow off his cart, Pingu does a little digging himself.

programme.title: Pingu
programme.desc: Father tries to make a table but spends most of his time keeping Pingu out of his toolbox. | When Pingu goes snowboarding with Robby, he wishes he was as good at jumps as his friend. | Grandfather tells Pingu about the moon and he desperately wants to visit.

programme.title: Pingu
programme.desc: Pingu and Pinga sleep in a tent and Pingu tries to scare her. | When Pinga has a case of the hiccups, Pingu tries to get rid of them by scaring his little sister. | When he takes Pingu on a fishing trip, it turns out that Father doesn’t always know best.

programme.title: Pingu
programme.desc: Everyone except Pingu seems to be entering the local Ice Sculpture Contest. | Pingu and Father are trying to inflate a balloon but it is proving harder than they thought. | Pingu and Pinga are driving Mother crazy with their incessant banging – they’ll use any surface as a drum!

programme.title: Pingu
programme.desc: Pingu wants to get his flippers on Mother’s knitting machine. When she takes a rest, Pingu seizes his chance to knit up a storm! | It's bedtime but Pingu and Pinga are still outside playing. | Pingu and Pinga are playing tag. Pingu think he has given his sister the slip but finds himself stuck.

programme.title: Pingu
programme.desc: Pingu and Pinga find some stickers in their cereal box, and begin to label things. | Pingu knows that he’s in trouble when he breaks the igloo’s doorbell. | Robby is extremely good at balancing a fish on the end of his nose.

programme.title: Pingu
programme.desc: Pingu drops a bottle of milk and it rolls into an icy ravine. | Pingu is excited to make pancakes. programme.title: Pingu
programme.desc: Pingu discovers that the further he rolls his snowballs, the bigger they become. | Pingu uses a hose and funnel to play tricks on his family and friends. | Pingu wants to have a go on Grandfather’s potter’s wheel but his pottery is nowhere near as good as Grandfather’s.

programme.title: Pingu
programme.desc: When Pingu and Pinga play too roughly, they ruin Mother’s new hat. | Pingu is first in line at the new snack stall. He casually drops the wrapper after he has eaten his treat and everyone copies him. | Pingu is a bit of a tearaway when it comes to sledging.

programme.title: Pingu
programme.desc: Pingu is jealous of the attention his sick sister is getting… so he pretends to be sick as well! | Pingu and Pinga decide to play a surprise joke on Mother by putting Pinga in an old box. | Pingu is invited to a birthday party but doesn’t want Pinga to go too.

programme.title: Pingu
programme.desc: Pingu’s teacher is showing the class how to make papier-mâché shapes – and Pingu and his friends are impressed. | Pingu can’t get enough of his favourite fishy snacks. | Father gives Pingu a driving lesson but Pingu accidentally breaks the speed stick.

programme.title: Pingu
programme.desc: Pingu really wants a new toy, but Mother won’t buy him any of the toys he shows her while shopping. | Pingu is charged with looking after the school pet. It’s a crotchety crab that doesn’t like Pingu | Pingu wreaks havoc when he is forced to tag along with Mother to the beauty parlour.

programme.title: Pingu
programme.desc: When Pinga bumps her toe, Pingu has a great time wrapping her throbbing foot and making her giggle. | Pingu finds a magical flute, but no one seems to appreciate his noisy tooting… except the fish! | Pingi seems to prefer playing with Pingo than Pingu.

programme.title: Pingu

programme.title: Pingu
programme.desc: Pingu is painting when he accidentally spills red paint and things quickly get out of control. | Pingu sees a new scooter but Pingg buys it first! | Pingu tries to impress his friends by diving into the pool but quickly finds that it is not as easy as it looks!

programme.title: Pingu

programme.title: Pingu
programme.desc: Pingu has the day off of school and wants to enjoy his freedom rather than help his Mother. | Pingu gets into a little mischief after he finds a bow and arrow. | Pingu ignores a warning about flying his kite near his irritable neighbour’s house and has to try and get it back.

programme.title: Pingu
programme.desc: Pingu discovers a magnet and decides to use it to trick his friend. | Pingu is playing with his boat on the water, but it keeps sinking because of a leaky hull. | After Pingu falls asleep while playing with his toys, he has a really sweet dream.

programme.title: Pingu

programme.title: Pingu
programme.desc: Pingu sees a magic kit in the shop and really wants it. | Pingu discovers a large present on his birthday. He wants to open it but is told he has to wait. | When Father insists that Pingu put everything in its right place, Pingu gets organized.

programme.title: Pingu
programme.desc: Pingu sees a picture in a book of a tower that goes to the sky and wants to build one just like it. | Pinga discovers a book about kingdoms and Pingu thinks that it would be great to be a king. | Pingu wants to bake his own cake.

programme.title: Ted the Train
programme.desc: Tutti a bordo del treno dell'apprendimento! Ted è un treno che insegna ai bambini i colori, gli animali, la frutta, la verdura e molto altro.

programme.title: Amber the Ambulance
programme.desc: Tutti si ammalano a volte, anche gli abitanti di Car City. All'ospedale, Ambra l'Ambulanza li aiuta sempre a stare bene.

programme.desc: Incontra Jonny Toolbox e le AnimaCars e unisciti alle loro numerose missioni di salvataggio per riportare la pace ad Animatown!

programme.title: Babies in Car City
programme.desc: I Babies sono macchinine curiose il cui senso di meraviglia li conduce sempre in fantastiche avventure - e a volte nei guai!

programme.desc: A Car City tutti si prendono cura gli uni degli altri. La Car Patrol è una squadra speciale che lavora per mantenere tutti i residenti al sicuro e in buona salute.

programme.title: Spymate
programme.desc: Minkey, una super scimmia addestrata come spia, fa squadra con il suo ex partner Mike per salvare la figlia di Mike dalle grinfie di uno scienziato malvagio.

programme.title: I Puffi
programme.desc: Forzuto e Inventore, per non parlare di tutti gli altri, competono per le attenzioni amorose di Puffetta.

programme.title: I Puffi
programme.desc: Il nuovo amico peloso e lanuginoso di Tontolone causa molti problemi nel villaggio dei Puffi con le sue abitudini alimentari e riproduttive. Nel frattempo, un folletto dei boschi regala a Puffetta un paio di scarpe da ballo con un sinistro segreto.

programme.title: I Puffi
programme.desc: Forzuto vorrebbe essare un cavaliere valoroso. Quando un grosso drago dà fuoco alla foresta e al villaggio, decide di partire per sconfiggerlo.

programme.title: I Puffi
programme.desc: Tontolone e Puffetta cadono nelle grinfie di un uomo malvagio che li vuole far esibire nel suo spettacolo itinerante.

programme.title: I Puffi
programme.desc: Puffo Poeta e Puffo Pittore non si sentono apprenzzati dagli altri Puffi e decidono di andarsene. Nel loro viaggio si imbattono nel perfido Gargamella ma per fortuna Grande Puffo corre in loro aiuto.

programme.title: I Puffi
programme.desc: I Puffi adorano i tartufi, ma i tartufi appartengono ai Trolls. E i Trolls vivono ai peidi del Monte Tratufo nel cui largo si nasconde la terribile Cosa senza Nome.

programme.title: I Puffi
programme.desc: Grande Puffo si innamora di una ninfa dei boschi di nome Campanellina, ignaro del fatto che il suo fascino seducente fa parte di un complotto ordito da Baldassarre per catturare tutti gli animali del bosco, nel suo ultimo piano per rovesciare Lord Homnibus e governare il regno con mano autocratica.

programme.title: I Puffi
programme.desc: Grande Puffo ricorda l'emozionante viaggio di Sognatore in alto mare e le sue avvincenti avventure con tartarughe marine, balene, isole deserte... e pirati!

programme.title: I Puffi
programme.desc: Hogartha si traveste da Premio Puffo d'Oro per catturare i Puffi e usarli come ingrediente principale nella sua crema di bellezza.

programme.title: Zip & Zap - Il club delle biglie
programme.desc: Dopo essere stati sorpresi a rubare le risposte del test scolastico, i gemelli Zip e Zap sono costretti per punizione a trascorrere l’estate in un rigido istituto dove è vietato ogni tipo di divertimento.

programme.title: Air Bud 3
programme.desc: Quando Emma, la nuova ragazzina carina,si unisce alla squadra di calcio maschile, Josh e Buddy decidono che quest’anno si gioca a calcio. Come Josh ed Emma iniziano a conoscersi, Buddy e Molly, il cane di Emma, iniziano a incontrarsi fugacemente di notte.

programme.title: La Storia Infinita
programme.desc: Tratto dal bestseller mondiale di Michael Ende, "La storia infinita" è l'odissea di un bambino catapultato in un mondo senza tempo popolato da creature fantastiche che solo lui può salvare.

programme.title: Alpha & Omega
programme.desc: Due giovani lupi in contrasto l'uno con l'altro si trovano a doversi alleare per far fronte alla situazione sfavorevole nella quale sono finiti

programme.title: The Last Warrior - La spada magica
programme.desc: La pace e la tranquillità si sono insediate a Belogoria. Il male è stato sconfitto e Ivan si sta godendo la meritata fama.

programme.title: Il ragazzo e il grande elefante
programme.desc: Da quando entrambi i genitori sono morti, Phoenix viene affidato alla zia Sarah, che vive in Africa con suo marito Jack. Qui rimane subito affascinato dalla natura selvaggia del continente. Durante un safari incontrerà un grande elefante con cui andrà incontro a emozionanti avventure.

programme.title: Spymate
programme.desc: Minkey, una super scimmia addestrata come spia, fa squadra con il suo ex partner Mike per salvare la figlia di Mike dalle grinfie di uno scienziato malvagio.

programme.title: Alvin Superstar
programme.desc: La vita del musicista Dave Neville sta per essere sconvolta dall’arrivo di tre scoiattoli canterini: Alvin, Simon e Theodore. Tre forze della natura che, oltre a devastargli la casa, distruggergli la carriera e stravolgergli completamente la vita, si rivelano una band musicale strepitosa.

programme.title: Air Bud 5: un amico dal tocco magico
programme.desc: Buddy sta portando il suo show nelle spiaggie grazie ad un nuovo sport: il beach volley! La vita in spiaggia non è così rilassante come sembra. Un'ondata di furti misteriosi ha colpito la città e sono state trovate impronte di zampe sulle scene del crimine.

programme.title: Jack Il Primate Più Verticale 2
programme.desc: Dopo essere stato cacciato dalla squadra di hockey, Jack incontra Ben, uno skateboarder ambizioso. Ben scopre che Jack è molto abile con lo skateboard e i due decidono di partecipare a una competizione di skateboard in giro per il paese!

programme.title: Robinson Crusoe
programme.desc: La vera storia di Robinson Crusoe raccontata dal pappagallo Venerdì che sull'isola è diventato il suo migliore amico.

programme.title: Il fantastico mondo di Aladino
programme.desc: Calvin, un giovane commesso della pizza a domicilio, viene portato nella Bagdad dell'ottavo secolo grazie al Genio della lampada. Qui, con l'aiuto di Alì Babà e della principessa Sherazade, recupererà la lampada di Aladino.

programme.title: La programmazione riprenderà a breve
programme.desc: Ci stiamo concedendo un sonno riparatore per tornare più belli di prima! Resta sintonizzato e presto arriveranno altre proposte straordinarie di intrattenimento a cura di Rakuten TV.

programme.title: Where's Chicky?
programme.desc: Nessuno sa dove sia Chicky. Sappiamo solo che è carino e tanto ingenuo. In questa serie, seguite Chicky, l'uccellino dei cartoni animati, mentre si aggira intorno a un frigorifero, un tostapane, un copertone e tanti altri oggetti!

programme.title: Where's Chicky?
programme.desc: Nessuno sa dove sia Chicky. Sappiamo solo che è carino e tanto ingenuo. In questa serie, seguite Chicky, l'uccellino dei cartoni animati, mentre si aggira intorno a un puzzle, un trenino, un cestino e tanti altri oggetti!

programme.title: Where's Chicky?
programme.desc: Nessuno sa dove sia Chicky. Sappiamo solo che è carino e tanto ingenuo. In questa serie, seguite Chicky, l'uccellino dei cartoni animati, mentre si aggira intorno a una lampadina, una piastra, un Forza 4 e altri oggetti!

programme.title: Where's Chicky?
programme.desc: Chicky e Bekky suonano uno strumento a corde. Situazioni esilaranti e sorprese inaspettate per i nostri tre piccoli amici in questa compilation!

programme.title: Where's Chicky?
programme.desc: Chicky e Poyo saltano più e più volte da un divertente trampolino rosa. Situazioni esilaranti e sorprese inaspettate per i nostri tre piccoli amici in questa compilation!

programme.title: Where's Chicky?
programme.desc: Chicky e Bekky scoprono un oggetto divertente con dei quadrati illuminati. Situazioni esilaranti e sorprese inaspettate per i nostri tre piccoli amici in questa compilation!

programme.title: Care Bears: Unlock the Magic
programme.desc: Una nuova orsetta di nome Unione sta per diventare un'Orsetta del Cuore ufficiale quando Allegra rompe accidentalmente la pietra magica necessaria per scegliere il suo colore! Gli orsetti si avventurano in una caverna mistica piena di enigmi e trappole per trovare una nuova pietra.

programme.title: Care Bears: Unlock the Magic
programme.desc: Brontolorso viene colto da un temporale magico che lo fa ingrandire ogni volta che si arrabbia. E ogni volta che cresce, si arrabbia di più! Gli Orsetti del Cuore devono lavorare insieme per trovare una soluzione prima che Brontolorso diventi troppo grande per il loro mondo!

programme.title: Care Bears: Unlock the Magic
programme.desc: Fortunello e Splendente catturano un magico Amico Stellare che concede loro mille desideri! All'inizio è divertente, ma i loro continui desideri causano così tanti problemi che vorrebbero non aver mai iniziato!

programme.title: Big Baby
programme.desc: Uno scienziato progetta una macchina per la trasformazione genetica e il suo nipotino di soli 4 anni si trasforma accidentalmente in un uomo di 30. Il "Bambino" sfugge e corre intorno alla città rincorso dai fratelli che fanno di tutto per recuperarlo prima dell'arrivo dei propri genitori.

programme.title: A spasso con Willy
programme.desc: A seguito della distruzione della loro navicella, il giovane Willy viene separato dai genitori con cui viaggiava nello spazio. La sua capsula di salvataggio atterra su un pianeta selvaggio e inesplorato. Con l’aiuto di Buck, un robot di sopravvivenza, dovrà cavarsela fino all’arrivo dei soccorsi.

programme.title: Air Bud 2 - Eroe a Quattro Zampe
programme.desc: Buddy ha un altro asso nella zampa — il football. Quando il padrone di Buddy improvvisamente diventa quarterback nella sua scuola, anche Buddy si ritrova nella mischia! L’accoppiata esplosiva di Buddy e Josh aiuta a portare i Timberwolves al Campionato statale.

programme.title: Il tesoro di Whittmore
programme.desc: Albie e Tiffany vengono mandati a casa della zia per le vacanze. Qui i ragazzi conoscono un gruppo di bizzarri coetanei emarginati, impegnati nella ricerca di un fantomatico tesoro.

programme.title: Birba - Micio combinaguai
programme.desc: Un gatto di nome Oscar vive da tempo in un grattacielo in città con suo figlio Birba. Un giorno, incuriosito dal mondo esterno, Birba decide di uscire di casa ed avventurarsi alla ricerca di Miciolandia.

programme.title: Air Bud 5: un amico dal tocco magico
programme.desc: Buddy sta portando il suo show nelle spiaggie grazie ad un nuovo sport: il beach volley! La vita in spiaggia non è così rilassante come sembra. Un'ondata di furti misteriosi ha colpito la città e sono state trovate impronte di zampe sulle scene del crimine.

programme.title: La Storia Infinita
programme.desc: Tratto dal bestseller mondiale di Michael Ende, "La storia infinita" è l'odissea di un bambino catapultato in un mondo senza tempo popolato da creature fantastiche che solo lui può salvare.

programme.title: A Plumm Summer - Una magica estate
programme.desc: Froggie Doo, pupazzo animato protagonista di un fortunato spettacolo televisivo, viene rapito. Due fratellini, Elliott e Rocky Plumm, aiutano l'FBI nelle indagini per recuperare il proprio eroe.

programme.title: Il regno di Wuba
programme.desc: Uomini e mostri non possono convivere in armonia: i primi, per paura o per diletto, finiranno sempre per andare a caccia dei secondi. Consapevole di questo, la Regina dei Mostri, incinta e minacciata di morte, fa di tutto per preservare la salute del nascituro.

programme.title: The Amazing Wizard Of Paws
programme.desc: Al compimento dei dodici anni, un ragazzo che soffre di ansia in modo patologico scopre che il suo cane ha seicento anni e che era stato precedentemente di proprietà di un potente mago.

programme.title: Chestnut - Un eroe a quattro zampe
programme.desc: Le giovani sorelle orfane Sal e Rae pensano di aver fatto centro quando trovano un adorabile cucciolo di alano il giorno stesso in cui vengono informate che saranno adottate... ma presto scopriranno che nel loro nuovo elegante appartamento a Manhattan i cani non sono ammessi.

programme.title: Air Buddies - Cuccioli Alla Riscossa
programme.desc: E' arrivata la nuova generazione del famoso franchise di successo Air Bud! Questa volta i protagonisti sono u cinque cuccioli di Air Bud, i Buddies, impegnati in una missione di salvataggio per salvare i loro genitori.

programme.title: Nicky Horne's Best Of British Rock
programme.desc: Nicky Horne's definitive 30 best British rock tracks from across the decades! Featuring Queen, Yes, Deep Purple, Motorhead, The Sex Pistols but who is the very best of British?

programme.title: Rated Rock! The No.1s
programme.desc: Number 1 rock songs from the last 50 years! With mega hits from the Arctic Monkeys & KOL right back to legends like The Stones & T.Rex!

programme.title: Big Hair & Power Chords!
programme.desc: 20 epic songs loaded with mega hair energy & power chords! From 80s rock icons Boston, Whitesnake & Chicago to modern day heroes The Darkness, Green Day & My Chemical Romance.

programme.title: Air Guitar Anthems! 1980-1989
programme.desc: Dust down your air guitar, cause we've 40 rock anthems from the 80s to strum along to! From AC/DC in 1980 to GN'R in 1989, via U2, Kiss, Toto, Springsteen & ZZ Top.

programme.title: Sunday Rock Classics
programme.desc: Rounding off the week with rock classics and anthems! We guarantee AC/DC, Nirvana, Queen, Meat Loaf, Bon Jovi & much more!

programme.title: Monsters of Rock! 1990-1999
programme.desc: A definitive 6 hour marathon of 90s guitar anthems! From U2 to INXS, Blur to Bon Jovi, Skunk Anansie to Green Day, Metallica to Iron Maiden - 70 rock classics are here, in order!

programme.title: Essential Air Guitar: Killer Riffs
programme.desc: From killer riffs in the 20s right back to the legendary solos of the 80s, we're counting down 12 essential anthems that you just need to know!

programme.title: Nicky Horne's 30 Greatest Albums
programme.desc: Nicky Horne presents his favourite songs behind 30 of the greatest rock album covers ever! Featuring The Beatles & Queen, The Stones & Pink Floyd.

programme.title: Rated Rock! The No.1s
programme.desc: Number 1 rock songs from the last 50 years! With mega hits from the Arctic Monkeys & KOL right back to legends like The Stones & T.Rex!

programme.title: 50 Best Rock Hits Of the 00s
programme.desc: 50 mega-anthems that rocked the 00s! With Green Day, Linkin Park, The Strokes, Paramore, Blink-182, The Killers & much more!

programme.title: Monsters of Rock! 1990-1999
programme.desc: A definitive 6 hour marathon of 90s guitar anthems! From U2 to INXS, Blur to Bon Jovi, Skunk Anansie to Green Day, Metallica to Iron Maiden - 70 rock classics are here, in order!

programme.title: Essential Air Guitar: Killer Riffs
programme.desc: From killer riffs in the 20s right back to the legendary solos of the 80s, we're counting down 12 essential anthems that you just need to know!

programme.title: Nicky Horne's 30 Greatest Albums
programme.desc: Nicky Horne presents his favourite songs behind 30 of the greatest rock album covers ever! Featuring The Beatles & Queen, The Stones & Pink Floyd.

programme.title: Rock Ballads: 1980-1989
programme.desc: The 80s was an amazing decade for rock ballads from Bon Jovi to Bonnie Tyler, Chicago to Cher. Relive a decade of the biggest rock ballads in order.

programme.title: Rated Rock! The No.1s
programme.desc: Number 1 rock songs from the last 50 years! With mega hits from the Arctic Monkeys & KOL right back to legends like The Stones & T.Rex!

programme.title: Guns N' Roses: Rock Icons
programme.desc: An hour of Anthems and the biggest rock songs from rock legends Guns N' Roses!

programme.title: Nicky Horne's 30 Hardest Hitters!
programme.desc: The 30 greatest rock drummers in the world! These are Nicky's hardest hitters featuring Dave Grohl, Tommy Lee, Keith Moon, Ginger Baker, John Bonham but who is his Number 1?

programme.title: High School Rock Out: 1995-2005
programme.desc: We open the high school year book with Weezer in 1995 and remember the amazing bands that rocked every school party through to 2005!

programme.title: 30 Rock & Indie Heroes of the 10s
programme.desc: Claire Sturgess relives the 2010s with her 30 greatest heroes in rock and indie. The Vaccines, Biffy Clyro and Imagine Dragons are all in the Top 10, but who is her number 1?

programme.title: Killer Cuts Of The 00s!
programme.desc: A decade of mega hits and the loudest anthems! Expect Biffy Clyro, Linkin Park, Blink 182, Evanescence, Fall Out Boy & loads more!

programme.title: Linkin Park: Fan Favourites
programme.desc: Starting in 2001, here are the biggest rock songs from Linkin Park!

programme.title: Turn Up The Emo Anthems!
programme.desc: Turn up your speakers to 11 and live life even louder! Emo Anthems in order from Linkin Park in 2000 to The My Chemical Romance at the end of the Decade!

programme.title: The Anthems!
programme.desc: Turn it up to 11 for the finest rock anthems! Featuring Kings Of Leon, The Killers, Green Day, Biffy Clyro & The Foo Fighters. This is Now Rock!

programme.title: Dumbass Anthems: 2000-2007
programme.desc: 25 All-Killer 00s Dumbass Anthems! From Blink-182 and Wheatus to Fall Out Boy and Scouting For Girls.

programme.title: Maxed Out On Anthems!
programme.desc: Live it loud and Max out on the finest rock anthems! Featuring Paramore, Imagine Dragons, Linkin Park, Evanescense & The Arctic Monkeys. This is Now Rock!

programme.title: Rock 'n' Roll Top 3s: 1990-1999
programme.desc: A 2 hour run through, in order, of top 3 hits from the 90s - all with that rock n roll swagger! Expect plenty of U2, Def Leppard, Meat Loaf & Brit Pop!.

programme.desc: In the 80s the Scottish scene was vibrant & creative with punk, indie, synth, acoustic & Celtic folk influences topping the charts. Altered Images' Clare Grogan has 30 of the best.

programme.title: First Blast of Summer!
programme.desc: The Heat Is On with the hottest tunes of the 80s! We crank up the neon and hit the dancefloor with the most electrifying feelgood music videos the decade had to offer.

programme.title: Girls Just Wanna Have Fun! 1980-89
programme.desc: NOW 80s rolls out 5 hours of the fiercest females! From Cyndi & Madonna to Whitney, Bananarama & Kylie, it’s wall-to-wall singalongs & unapologetic 80s fabulousness!

programme.title: Your Pulse Of Metal
programme.desc: Sync your heartbeat to the complex rhythms of the underground. This collection dives into technical mastery and hidden gems that push your adrenaline. If you’re ready to feel the music in your veins, we’ve got the tracks.

programme.title: For Metalheads Only
programme.desc: Leave the rock anthems at the door—this is 100% pure steel. We’ve dialed the distortion to eleven for a lineup strictly for the heavy-duty fans. No compromises, no fillers, just total sonic devastation.

programme.title: Heavy Pumping
programme.desc: Ditch the pre-workout and let the riffs do the heavy lifting. This high-octane blast of speed and power is designed to fuel your gains or ignite a living room mosh pit. High BPMs, crushing drums, and zero excuses.

programme.title: New Rock And Metal Videos For You
programme.desc: Stay ahead of the curve with the freshest drops from the global underground. From world premieres to the latest studio masterpieces, we’ve gathered the newest sonic assaults in one place. If it’s loud and new, it’s here.

programme.title: Flying V
programme.desc: Info not available

programme.title: Wishbone Ash - Live In Hamburg
programme.desc: Info not available

programme.title: Together We Rise
programme.desc: A tribute to the global brotherhood that refuses to fit in. This collection celebrates the unity that turns fans into a tribe. In this pit, no one stands alone—together, we are the loudest force on earth.

programme.title: Endless Heavyness
programme.desc: Dive into pure power and unrelenting energy. Endless Heavyness is a non-stop wall of sound designed to hit hard and stay loud. No pauses, no compromises—just the most massive tracks to keep the momentum going. It’s not just loud; it’s eternal.

programme.title: Where Heavy Music Lives
programme.desc: Your official gateway to the underground. Discover your first distorted riff or find a circle of peers who "get it." Welcome to the neighborhood—it’s loud, it’s proud, and there’s always room for one more.

programme.title: Metal That Rocks
programme.desc: Where rock 'n' roll swagger meets the weight of metal. This collection bridges the gap, featuring everything from anthemic hard rock to core-shaking classics. It’s loud, it’s proud, and it’s built to move you.

programme.title: Bay Area Godfathers
programme.desc: Info not available

programme.title: Bay Area Godfathers II
programme.desc: Info not available

programme.title: Wishbone Ash - Live in London - 30th Anniversary Concert
programme.desc: Info not available

programme.title: Viaggi di spirito Veneto
programme.desc: Vicenza - Sotto la Basilica del Palladio, ad aspettare Marco, famiglia di distillatori da generazioni, che porterà Julian ad assaggiare il Girolimino del Molin Vecio e la grappa “proibita”.

programme.title: Ritratto di chef S6
programme.desc: Paolo Trippini - La vita, il lavoro, i progetti, i sogni dei grandi chef raccontati in prima persona. Storie di persone e di passioni, di vittorie e di sconfitte, di scelte, di rinunce e di ritorni.

programme.title: Ritratto di chef S6
programme.desc: Tommaso Arrigoni - La vita, il lavoro, i progetti, i sogni dei grandi chef raccontati in prima persona. Storie di persone e di passioni, di vittorie e di sconfitte, di scelte, di rinunce e di ritorni.

programme.title: Vino cibo e natura S3
programme.desc: Renato Raimo - Renato Raimo esperto di fitoterapia raccoglie con Cristiano le erbe che accompagno le ricette ma soprattutto curano il corpo.

programme.title: Cosi' lontani cosi' vicini S.1
programme.desc: Max, italiano doc, e Mai, giapponese doc, ci faranno vedere come alcune ricette italiane e a altre ricette giapponesi non sono poi così lontane.

programme.title: Giorgione orto e cucina
programme.desc: Pesaro, Urbino - Giorgione viaggia nelle Marche per fare incetta dei prodotti di questa terra. Curiosità, consigli e le immancabile ricette.

programme.title: Vito con i suoi e Giorgione
programme.desc: Giorgione in trasferta. La famiglia Bicocchi al completo invita Giorgione a San Giovanni Persiceto per trascorrere qualche giorno in compagnia di ricette tradizionali, laide, corrotte e test

programme.title: The best beker S.3
programme.desc: Fabrizio Nonis, "El Bekér," ci guida alla scoperta delle migliori macellerie d’Italia. Non si parla solo di tagli di carne, ma si esplorano in modo approfondito razze nazionali e internazionali, l’origine e le caratteristiche delle carni.

programme.title: One BIG Recipe
programme.desc: Protein-packed plant-based foods are on the One Big Recipe for chef Kimberly Lallouz's Vegetarian Dinner, five fun, filling courses designed for both vegetarians and omnivores. First up is yummy White Bean Hummus, served with pita, topped with savoury Caramelized Onion Jam and fried sage. Next is umami-packed Grilled Treviso Salad with arugula pesto, red grapes, and pine nuts. Brussels Sprouts shine in her Kimchi-inspired Korean take, topped with crunchy brown butter cashews. Salt Crusted Potato with Chive Oil will wow even the most skeptical carnivore in your orbit, and to finish, Pasta Giardina is a painting on a plate, tossing together multi-hued ribbons of garden veggies with fresh...

programme.title: Watts On the Grill
programme.desc: Grill master Spencer Watts shows us four ways to barbeque a classic. Succulent, tender, mouth-watering ribs.

programme.title: Watts On the Grill
programme.desc: Barbecuing bananas, that's crazy. Chef Spencer Watts shows us how to grill the delicate, evERS-scrumptious fruit. Bananas.

programme.title: Watts On the Grill
programme.desc: Fish. Flaky, flavoursome, and perfect for barbeque. High energy host Spencer Watts tests out his grill with delightfully tender fish dishes.

programme.title: Watts On the Grill
programme.desc: Shellfish is delicate, tantalizing, and full of flavour, especially when it's grilled to perfection

programme.title: Watts On the Grill

programme.title: Watts On the Grill
programme.desc: Salsa means undeniable flavour! Lively host Spencer Watts plays with sweet, salty, and spicy in four amazing salsa recipes.

programme.title: Watts On the Grill
programme.desc: Grilling expert Spencer Watts hosts a tasty beef-a-palooza with four incredible beef cuts including smoked brisket and succulent beef tenderloin.

programme.title: Watts On the Grill
programme.desc: Barbeque is not just about meat! Chef Spencer Watts shows us how to grill fruits and vegetables like a pro.

programme.title: Watts On the Grill
programme.desc: Charismatic host Spencer Watts shows us why chicken is best on the grill with four irresistible chicken recipes.

programme.title: Watts On the Grill
programme.desc: There are limitless options with lamb on the grill! Host Spencer Watts offers some tips and tricks on how to prepare four different cuts of lamb.

programme.title: Watts On the Grill
programme.desc: Whether for a small family dinner or a big backyard barbeque, host Spencer Watts shows us the best ways to grill up tasty duck, turkey, capon, and quail.

programme.title: Watts On the Grill
programme.desc: Never underestimate the power of a good side or dessert! Fun host Spencer Watts grills up the perfect sides and treats for your next barbeque.

programme.title: Watts On the Grill
programme.desc: Pork and the grill are good buddies and host Spencer Watts shows us four of his favourite pork recipes that will have you salivating.

programme.title: Watts On the Grill
programme.desc: Fun and quirky host Chef Spencer Watts kicks off this episode by showing off his knife skills as he sabres a pineapple to start his instant classic; Grilled Fruit Salad. The pineapple joins a mix of bright summer fruits on the grill, then berries, spicy citrus vinaigrette and savoury feta cheese. Next up, Spencer whips up his Hawaiian Chicken recipe. Spiced with cayenne and Chinese five spice, Spencer stuffs flavourful chicken thighs with pineapple and grills it with a delightful ginger and soy sauce. Every bite is sweet, savoury, and fresh - exactly how summer should taste! Then Spencer shares his top tips for adding smoky flavours to pork using an easy and handy smoke pouch. His Apple...

programme.title: Watts On the Grill
programme.desc: Onions, green onions, chives, garlic, and leeks are all members of the same fabulous flowering family, Allium! First up? Chef Watts shows us his sweet and smoky Charred Leeks with Romesco; add grilled toast and you have your next party appetizer! Next up is a main course. Spencer starts with a juicy grilled pork chop, then adds roasted garlic melted into a balsamic onion chutney to make his out-of-this-world Roasted Garlic Pork Chops. Looking for a crowd pleaser that's easy to make? Spencer has a recipe for that! Chicken Yakitori. He threads skewers with crunchy green onions and tender chicken and caramelizes the yakitori sauce as he grills this tasty dish. Are you ready to drool? Spencer...

programme.title: Watts On the Grill
programme.desc: Have a cheese lover coming over? Blow their minds with some of Spencer's "grate" barbecued cheese recipes! First up, Spencer chars Brie Cheese to an ooey-gooey perfection and tops it with tart cherries and crunchy walnuts, serving it with crispy grilled crostinis. Next up is a Grilled Steak and Caesar with a twist only Spencer could add - grilled... lettuce! Then, Spencer uses the classic German "hasselback" presentation to stuff chicken breasts with verdant spinach, yummy Swiss cheese and pungent sun- dried tomatoes, grilling them to melty perfection. Finally, Spencer fires up his barbecue to make his Grilled Peaches with Salted Bourbon Caramel, a decadent dessert elevated with creamy...

programme.title: Watts On the Grill

programme.title: Watts On the Grill
programme.desc: Fun and quirky host Chef Spencer Watts kicks off this episode by showing off his knife skills as he sabres a pineapple to start his instant classic; Grilled Fruit Salad. The pineapple joins a mix of bright summer fruits on the grill, then berries, spicy citrus vinaigrette and savoury feta cheese. Next up, Spencer whips up his Hawaiian Chicken recipe. Spiced with cayenne and Chinese five spice, Spencer stuffs flavourful chicken thighs with pineapple and grills it with a delightful ginger and soy sauce. Every bite is sweet, savoury, and fresh - exactly how summer should taste! Then Spencer shares his top tips for adding smoky flavours to pork using an easy and handy smoke pouch. His Apple...

programme.title: Watts On the Grill
programme.desc: Onions, green onions, chives, garlic, and leeks are all members of the same fabulous flowering family, Allium! First up? Chef Watts shows us his sweet and smoky Charred Leeks with Romesco; add grilled toast and you have your next party appetizer! Next up is a main course. Spencer starts with a juicy grilled pork chop, then adds roasted garlic melted into a balsamic onion chutney to make his out-of-this-world Roasted Garlic Pork Chops. Looking for a crowd pleaser that's easy to make? Spencer has a recipe for that! Chicken Yakitori. He threads skewers with crunchy green onions and tender chicken and caramelizes the yakitori sauce as he grills this tasty dish. Are you ready to drool? Spencer...

programme.title: Watts On the Grill
programme.desc: Have a cheese lover coming over? Blow their minds with some of Spencer's "grate" barbecued cheese recipes! First up, Spencer chars Brie Cheese to an ooey-gooey perfection and tops it with tart cherries and crunchy walnuts, serving it with crispy grilled crostinis. Next up is a Grilled Steak and Caesar with a twist only Spencer could add - grilled... lettuce! Then, Spencer uses the classic German "hasselback" presentation to stuff chicken breasts with verdant spinach, yummy Swiss cheese and pungent sun- dried tomatoes, grilling them to melty perfection. Finally, Spencer fires up his barbecue to make his Grilled Peaches with Salted Bourbon Caramel, a decadent dessert elevated with creamy...

programme.desc: Grill master Spencer Watts shows us four ways to barbeque a classic. Succulent, tender, mouth-watering ribs.

programme.title: One World Kitchen
programme.desc: Bring on the seafood! Home cook Mary Tang kicks off this episode of One World Kitchen 3 with a unique dish featuring chewy clams, sweet and bitter fermented black beans, and a collection of spices. Next, she makes us her favourite shrimp dish - Shrimp and Egg Fried Rice. Fluffy egg bits, lightly flavoured nutty brown rice, and a pop of tender shrimp works wonders for the taste buds. A common appetizer, Mary then walks us through a spicy concoction of deep-fried salt and pepper squid or Calamari. And who doesn't love lobster? Mary finishes off with Cantonese Lobster with Ginger and Scallions (yes, it tastes as good as it sounds!). A Cantonese take on the juicy protein, this dish is fried...

programme.title: One World Kitchen
programme.desc: A tasty four-course Vietnamese meal using fruit? Yes, please! For her first dish, talented home cook Lisa Nguyen uses tangy tamarind pulp to balance flavours in a savoury bowl of Vietnamese Sour Fish Soup. Then, she combines tart pomelo and sweet pineapple with juicy crab meat for a flavourful salad. Next up, hot Chicken Coconut Curry with a hint of citrusy lemongrass, sweet potatoes, and a kaffir lime leaf. Pair it with a warm, toasty baguette and you're good to go! Lisa's last dish is a mouth-watering, classic Vietnamese dessert. Soft and chewy Steamed Banana Cake drizzled in a sweet velvety coconut sauce crunchy sesame seeds will have you begging for more!

programme.title: One World Kitchen
programme.desc: Talented home cook Jasmin Ibrahim prepares delicious, sharable small plates in this episode of One World Kitchen. First on the menu, Grilled Lamb Skewers. Wonderfully charred and seasoned with sweet cinnamon, potent all-spice, and a punch of garlic, these lamb skewers will be the hype at your next family get-together! Then, Jasmin makes a famous Lebanese classic - Falafel and Hummus (so tasty!). Next up, savoury Zucchini Fritters with a zesty yogurt sauce are added to the mix for a little dinner party pizzazz. Finally, Jasmin's favourite cheese is the star of this next dish - Grilled Halloumi. Served with a sweet and citrusy rose drink, this small plate will have your guests going crazy!

programme.title: One World Kitchen
programme.desc: Cheese - a staple in traditional Greek cuisine! Talented home cook Joanna Chery fries up two delicious ap- petizers called Saganaki, both featuring two different types of cheese. First, she fries up kefaltyri, a hard, salty cheese in a dramatic burning flame of ouzo (licorice-flavoured alcohol) - Opa! Then, Joanna shows us a popular Fried Shrimp and Cheese appetizer using tasty feta and tender shrimp. Pair both dishes with a Greek rustic bread and you've nailed it! Next up, Joanna prepares a Greek classic - Spanakopita. This mouth-watering dish is made up of creamy ricotta, crispy phyllo pastry, fresh spinach, and a hint of dill (yum!). Moving on, Joanna showcases her all-time favourite...

programme.title: Spencer's Big 30
programme.desc: Crispy, crunchy, salty, and sweet - Chef Spencer Watts prepares a Spring-inspired Thai feast in under 30 minutes, for around 30 dollars.

programme.title: Spencer's Big 30
programme.desc: In 30 minutes, chef Spencer Watts cooks up homey classics including a mouth-watering Chicken Stew and melt-in-your-mouth Herb Butter Biscuits.

programme.title: Spencer's Big 30
programme.desc: Chef Spencer Watts cooks up an Italian feast for four including a cheesy Cannelloni and a fast and fluffy Tiramisu.

programme.title: Spencer's Big 30
programme.desc: It's pub night in Spencer Watts' kitchen! Forget going out - Spencer's pub recipes are bold in flavour and mild on the wallet!

programme.title: Road Grill
programme.desc: Teddy Bears of all age, shape, and size join our grill team with their owners for a day of games, rides and some teddy bear repair. Matt & the RG team are BBQing a menu even the pickiest eater will love. The menu: Grilled Almond Butter & Banana Sandwiches, Grilled Meatball Sub, Smoked White Cheddar Macaroni, and Quick & Snappy Ginger Lemon Ice Cream Sandwiches.

programme.title: Road Grill
programme.desc: Llamas, horses, and pigs...Oh My! The RG team lends it support to a farm animal rescue. Matt sets up his grills during a weekend fundraiser and stays friendly to his animal buddies by serving up a vegetarian menu. The menu: Portobello Burger Stack, Smoked Corn Tamale with Goat Cheese& Salsa Fresca, Pizza Salad Sandwich, and Tabbouleh Salad

programme.title: Road Grill
programme.desc: The neighbourhood outdoor pool is a great way to cool down on a hot summer day. Matt and the Grill Team are dipping their feet in the pool, splashing with the kids, and, of course, grilling up some fabulous eats to munch on while playing in the park or relaxing on your towel. The menu: BBQ'd Pork Tenderloin & Pears on Bagels, Grilled Asian Chicken Burger, Surf & Turf Kabobs with Arugula Pesto, and BBQ'd Cinnamon Donuts.

programme.title: Road Grill
programme.desc: It's graduation day at Chef School and Matt and the Grill team are sharing in the festivities. To congratulate the new Chefs, Matt has cooked up a masterful menu of fancy, yet simple, dishes. The menu: Mixed Seafood Grill on a Plank, Maple Rosemary Rotisserie Chicken, Dunked Hunan Lamb Rack, and Salmon Pastrami.

programme.title: One World Kitchen
programme.desc: China celebrates harvest with the Moon Festival, when the moon is at its fullest during mid-autumn. The best part? A delicious feast! Cantonese expert Mary Tang prepares a common Moon Festival dish - earthy and tasty Mushroom Stir Fry. Then, she cooks up a mouth-watering, Cantonese must-have - Steamed Crab. Using flawless technique, Mary breaks the juicy crab into pieces, fries and steams it in scented spices and sauces. Another Moon Festival staple is Cantonese Roast Duck - Mary uses sweet-savoury Chinese five-spice powder, dark soy sauce, and aromatic white pepper to make a fragrant rub. Finally, Moon Cake at the Moon Festival a given. Exquisitely crafted with red bean paste and sweet...

programme.title: One World Kitchen
programme.desc: Elegant Vietnamese fare is often inspired by legendary imperial city cuisine. In this One World Kitchen 3 episode, Host Lisa Nguyen gives us a magical taste of royalty with four colourful and delectable dishes. To start, Lisa ex- quisitely assembles a nice little starter for a royal dinner party - delicious Rice Cakes with Dried Shrimp. Next, she kicks it up a notch with a Spicy Hue Beef Noodle Soup - a truly slurp-worthy dish! For a touch of sweetness, Lisa then steams caramelized pork and tender shrimp dumplings in a lovely banana leaf. And there's no such thing as a classy Vietnamese dinner party without Baby Clams with Rice! The blend of contrasting flavours and textures in this...

programme.title: One World Kitchen
programme.desc: Spices are extremely important to Lebanese cuisine and host Jasmin Ibrahim uses a ton of them in four tasty Lebanese dishes. First, she prepares two classic, aromatic toppings for a Lebanese breakfast bread called Mana- keesh. Next up, juicy chicken and smokey freekah seasoned with sweet cinnamon, citrusy cardamom, pungent all spice, and black peppercorns. This dish captures the essence of Lebanese cuisine. Moving on, Jasmin then makes a thick and spicy beef stew. It's eaten vermicelli rice and seasoned with a classic Lebanese 7-spice combo. Fragrant and delicious, this dish can be served family-style for everyone to enjoy! For dessert, Jasmin whips up a wonderfully rich batch of Spiced...

programme.title: One World Kitchen
programme.desc: Home cook Joanna Chery prepares a series of traditional Greek dishes including Stuffed Vine Leaves - a classic dish made of lemon-doused grape leaves and stuffed with fluffy rice, fragrant herbs, and juicy beef. Then, she prepares a healthy and hearty dish called Giant Baked Beans. Typically used as a side, it pairs well with Jo- anna's next dish - succulent roast lamb and lemony potatoes. Finally, Joanna makes a Greek specialty - Fried Dough Ribbons. Satisfy your sweet tooth with these fried, coiled dough ribbons drizzled with sweet honey and sprinkled with sugar. Simple, fun, and evERS-popular in Greek cuisine, this dish is great for sharing amongst family and friends.

programme.desc: The Road Grill team goes rural and gets lost in hedge mazes at Saunders Farm. Luckily, they find their way out in time to cook up some BBQ and feed all families at the farm. programme.desc: Join chef Pino Di Cerbo in the Global Veggies kitchen as he creates veggie dishes inspired by Vietnam - Vietnamese Green Beans, Lebanon - Watermelon Tabbouleh, China - Signapore-Style Spaghetti Squash Noodles, and Germany - Celeriac Sauerbraten and Slaw!

programme.title: Up the Dish
programme.desc: The ultimate childhood comfort food, Grilled Cheese and Tomato Soup! Missy Hui takes this dish up with a basil- infused tomato soup that's ubERS-creamy and fresh! Don't forget the grilled cheese - gooey Havarti, provolone, and cheddar ooze out of this sandwich for an ultra-indulgent dish. Tiera Singh's twist on toast and tomatoes? Panzanella Salad! Ripe, seasonal tomatoes are tossed with a tangy capERS-vinegar dressing that is soaked up by crunchy croutons. Going higher? Micah Trainor's Seared Halloumi and Glazed Fruit grills the cheese - no bread needed! Seared halloumi is topped with bourbon-glazed fruit for a savoury-sweet vegetarian dish. Poppy Sandler's Lobster Roll with Sweet Corn...

programme.title: Cook Like a Chef

programme.title: Cook Like a Chef
programme.desc: Join our host, Chef Natalia Machado as she introduces us to her favourite techniques for using a wide variety of versatile, savoury tomatoes.

programme.title: The new era of design
programme.desc: Ogni azienda di arredo italiana nasce da una storia. Una mano che insegna, una visione che cresce, un’eredità che passa di generazione in generazione. Oggi, quella storia cambia forma. Le nuove generazioni stanno ridisegnando il futuro dell’abitare. Questa è la loro voce

programme.title: Fashion news
programme.desc: News e contenuti giornalistici con taglio economico-finanziario. Eventi, acquisizioni, cambi di poltrona, co-lab, nuove aperture, retail: un’informazione puntuale su tutto ciò che gira attorno al Fashion System

programme.title: Storie di impresa
programme.desc: Un viaggio alla scoperta delle imprese simbolo del Made in Italy, che punta a raccontarne la storia, l’identità, i valori e la mission, partendo dall’heritage per proiettarsi nel futuro. Un racconto composto da interviste ai protagonisti, immagini e video di archivio

programme.title: Med Nations 01 Italy

It's a journey through a country that has had a profound impact on art, cuisine, and culture throughout the Mediterranean and beyond.

programme.title: Malini Angelica Athens
programme.desc: Malini explores the ancient city of Athens, Greece. Once steeped in history, Athens has experienced a modern rebirth, now thriving with creativity, modern Greek gastronomy, a vibrant contemporary art scene, and unmatched nightlife.

programme.title: Rick Steves Europe
programme.desc: Slovenia, a small nation of just two million people, is one of Europe’s most surprising delights. Nestled at the crossroads of the Germanic, Mediterranean, and Slavic worlds, it offers a charm all its own.

programme.title: Colours of Mediterranean Culture
programme.desc: From Malta to Greece, Mediterranean arts flourish. Valletta Baroque Festival, Malta International Arts Festival, and Birgu by Candlelight light up the island with music and heritage. Italy’s Cortona on the Move, La Fenice in Piazza San Marco, and Mercantia Festival showcase photography, opera, and street performance. France’s Art Paris and International Garden Festival, Spain’s Revela’t Festival and La Leyenda de Tartessos, Portugal’s Umbrella Sky Project and Walk & Talk Biennale, Turkey’s Istanbul Theatre Festival and Biennial, and Greece’s Athens & Epidaurus Festival highlight the Med’s rich artistic tapestry.

programme.title: Med Destinations Crete
programme.desc: Med Destinations takes you to Crete, the jewel of the Greek islands, where ancient history meets breathtaking landscapes. Explore charming villages, hidden beaches, and the vibrant local culture that makes Crete a must-visit Mediterranean paradise.

programme.title: Pasolini il corpo e la voce
programme.desc: An unpublished self-portrait created with the materials of Tece Rai is the focus of this interactive documentary film by Maria Pia Ammirati, Arnaldo Colasanti, and Paolo Marcellini. Produced to mark the fortieth anniversary of the death of Pier Paolo Pasolini, it offers a unique exploration of his legacy.

programme.title: Malini Angelica Napoli
programme.desc: Malini Angelica visits Naples, in Italy’s vibrant Campania region. She dives into the city’s beautiful chaos to uncover the heart of Neapolitan culture, sampling delicious street food, meeting friendly locals, and exploring its rich history. With its authenticity and energy, Naples stands out as one of Italy’s most captivating cities.

programme.title: Whats On Sports Across the Mediterranean
programme.desc: The Mediterranean celebrates athleticism. Italy hosts The Torino Royal Marathon and Maratona Reale, while France Roc d Azur brings mountain biking excitement. Croatia CRO Race showcases professional cycling, and Cyprus hosts both the Limassol Marathon and Leptos Cyprus 4 Day Challenge. From road races to endurance challenges, sports unite communities along stunning Mediterranean landscapes.

programme.title: Whats On Conferences, Startups and Innovation
programme.desc: A new world is being built right now across the Mediterranean, and we are taking you behind the scenes of the most important meetings of the year. This week, we are at the historic Mediterranean Conference Centre in Valletta for MedTech World, where the conversation has shifted from simple gadgets to responsible AI that doctors and patients can actually trust. We then head south to the incredible energy of AfricaIgnite to meet the founders of high-growth startups in climate tech and finance who are proving that Africa is the new engine of global innovation. Back on the islands, we explore the Startup Malta Festival to see how a pro-business ecosystem is helping entrepreneurs scale their boldest ideas across Europe. Finally, we join the global dialogue at the Finance Malta Conference to see how a focus on quality over quantity is redefining the future of investment and sustainability. This is a journey through the ideas and the people who are turning today's challenges into the success stories of the future.

programme.title: Vivi e lascia vivere
programme.desc: As Giovanni’s life hangs in the balance, Laura’s world spirals further into chaos. Toni risks everything to see him, while Laura faces a dangerous blackmail threat. Meanwhile, her business and future are at stake as powerful forces push for its closure. With everything on the line, an unexpected twist forces Laura to make her final, life-changing decision.

programme.title: Mentre ero via
programme.desc: Monica returns home, trying to reconnect with her children while facing tension from her in-laws. As therapy begins to unlock memories, she starts sensing that those around her may be hiding the truth.

programme.title: Concerto - OSN Marc Albrecht E Simone Lamsma Torino
programme.desc: In this 2022 concert in Turin, Marc Albrecht conducts the Orchestra Sinfonica Nazionale della Rai, with Simone Lamsma as the violin soloist. The programme includes Shostakovich's Violin Concerto No. 1, showcasing Lamsma's technical brilliance and emotional depth, and Franck's Symphony in D minor, celebrated for its rich harmonies and cyclical structure. The performance highlights a powerful blend of passion and precision.
